title: 40 Pieces Bouncing Frog Toys, Jumping Toys, Mini Frog Toys, Parent-Child Toys, Party Game Props for Kids (Random Colors)
features: 📦Package content: You will receive a total of 40 pieces of bouncing frog toys measuring 4.5*4.2cm in 4 random colors (pink, blue, green, orange), they are waiting for your intimate interaction.

🌈Product material: The bouncing frog is made of PP material, which is safe, reliable and has no smell. The surface and corners of each frog have been processed to be free of burrs and edges to ensure it does not hurt your baby.
🎈Fun Bounce: Classic cute frog shape, but also has good bounce ability. With just a touch, they can jump so high, as if performing a vivid frog dance.

⛹️Easy to Use: Bouncing Frog's gameplay is simple and easy to understand, kids can master it quickly and enjoy the game easily. Parents can also participate, spend quality time with their children and cultivate parent-child relationships.

🎁Gift for Children: Use this mini frog as a birthday gift, learning reward or daily surprise, which can make children feel full of happiness and love. Illuminate children's childhood and accompany them in every happy moment.
